# ASSISTLANA - AI-Powered HR Platform

## About
ASSISTLANA is an AI-powered HR and recruitment platform serving India.
We help job seekers find jobs and internships, and help HR teams hire faster using AI.

## Key Features
- AI Resume Screening: Upload resume, get instant ATS score and improvement tips
- AI Mock Interview: Practice interviews with AI avatar in English or Tamil
- Job Portal: Browse and apply for jobs across India
- Internship Portal: Find internships for freshers
- HR Tools: Post jobs, screen resumes, manage candidates

## Target Users
- Job Seekers and Freshers looking for jobs in India
- HR professionals and companies hiring in India
- Students looking for internships

## Pages
- Homepage: https://assistlana-website-6fzh.vercel.app
- Jobs: https://assistlana-website-6fzh.vercel.app/jobs
- Internships: https://assistlana-website-6fzh.vercel.app/internships
- HR Signup: https://assistlana-website-6fzh.vercel.app/hr/signup
- About: https://assistlana-website-6fzh.vercel.app/about

## Contact
Email: admin@assistlana.com
Location: Pondicherry, Tamil Nadu, India
